description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a matte black finish and a robust, angular body. It is equipped with a fixed stock and a prominent pistol grip, providing ergonomic handling. The upper receiver is fitted with a rail system, supporting a mounted optical sight for enhanced targeting. The barrel is of standard length and ends with a flash hider, while the handguard is wide and textured for a secure grip. A detachable box magazine is inserted just ahead of the trigger guard, and the overall construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials. The rifle's design is consistent with contemporary military or law enforcement firearms, suitable for urban operations.
description: A modern, matte black tactical rifle with a fixed stock, rail-mounted sight, and detachable box magazine. The design is robust and ergonomic, featuring a standard barrel and flash hider.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow muzzle, flash hider, and the alignment of the sight system.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the rifle, including the stock, handguard, magazine, and mounted sight.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock, pistol grip, and the back of the sight system.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the magazine, trigger area, and the details of the handguard and sight.
